# BNC Builders Inc.

> Licensed general contractor serving San Diego County and North County San Diego. Kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, ADU construction, exterior remodeling, hardscaping, outdoor kitchens, landscape remodeling, room additions, garage conversions, deck repair, and pre-construction services. Over 30 years of combined experience with 900+ completed projects. BBB accredited. Bilingual (English and Spanish). Free estimates and financing available.

## Business Information

- Business Name: BNC Builders Inc.
- Business Type: Licensed General Contractor (License #1050284)
- Phone: (760) 658-6238
- Address: 101 State Pl Suite N, Escondido, CA 92029
- Hours: Monday through Saturday, 8:00am to 5:00pm
- Website: https://www.bncbuildersinc.com
- Founded: 2019
- Combined Team Experience: 30+ years
- Projects Completed: 900+

## Service Area

BNC Builders serves homeowners throughout San Diego County, including:

- Escondido (headquarters)
- Carlsbad
- Encinitas
- Oceanside
- Poway
- Vista
- Valley Center
- Rancho Santa Fe
- Solana Beach
- La Jolla
- El Cajon
- La Mesa
- Chula Vista
- National City

## Services

### Interior Remodeling
- [Kitchen Remodeling](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/kitchen-remodeling): Complete kitchen renovations including custom cabinetry, countertops, islands, backsplash, lighting, and appliance installation. 6-10 week typical timeline.
- [Bathroom Remodeling](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/bathroom-remodeling): Walk-in shower conversions, tub installations, vanities, heated floors, tile work, and accessibility modifications. 3-6 week typical timeline.
- [Home Remodeling](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/home-remodeling): Whole-house renovations, open concept conversions, flooring, lighting, and full interior updates.
- [Garage Remodeling](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/garage-remodeling): Garage-to-living-space conversions, home gyms, offices, guest suites, and storage optimization.
- [New Room Additions](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/new-room-additions): Bedrooms, home offices, family rooms, in-law suites, second story additions, and sunrooms. 4-6 month typical timeline.
- [Pre-Construction](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/pre-construction): Site analysis, architectural drawings, structural engineering, Title 24 compliance, permit management, and 360-degree VR previews.

### Exterior Remodeling
- [ADU Construction](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/adus): Detached ADUs, attached ADUs, garage conversion ADUs, and junior ADUs (JADUs). Complete permit-to-move-in service for San Diego and Los Angeles. 8-14 month typical timeline. ADUs rent for $1,500-$3,000+ monthly in San Diego.
- [Exterior Remodeling](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/exterior-remodeling): Backyard transformations, patios, decks, fire pits, outdoor living rooms, privacy screening, and outdoor lighting.
- [Hardscaping](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/hardscaping): Patio installation, walkways, retaining walls, driveways, fire pit surrounds, drainage solutions, and decorative concrete.
- [Outdoor Kitchens](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/outdoor-kitchens): Built-in grills, refrigeration, sinks, pizza ovens, bar seating, weather-resistant cabinetry, and gas line installation.
- [Landscape Remodeling](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/landscape-remodeling): Complete yard redesign, drought-tolerant landscaping, irrigation systems, landscape lighting, and water features.
- [Deck Repair](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/deck-repair): Structural assessment, board replacement, railing repair, waterproofing, and complete deck restoration.
- [3D Landscape Design](https://www.bncbuildersinc.com/3d-landscape-design): Photorealistic 3D renderings, virtual walkthroughs, day/night visualization, and material comparison before construction.

## Why Choose BNC Builders

- Licensed and insured general contractor (CA License #1050284)
- BBB accredited
- 30+ years combined team experience
- 900+ completed projects across San Diego County
- Free detailed estimates
- Flexible financing available
- Bilingual support (English and Spanish)
- Complete permit management included
- 3D design visualization technology
- Single point of contact throughout your project
